name: Looker
description: Monitor Looker (Google Cloud) business intelligence platform for user access and role assignments. Verify instance availability and employee access controls.

config.setupInstructions:
Setup steps:

1. Log in to your Looker instance as an Admin
2. Go to Admin > Users
3. Select the user account to use for API access (or create a dedicated service account)
4. Click Edit > API Keys > New API Key
5. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
6. Enter your Looker instance URL (e.g., https://mycompany.looker.com)

Note: The API user needs the 'Admin' role or at minimum 'see_users' and 'see_roles' permissions to list users and roles.

credentialFields.label: Looker Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Looker instance URL (e.g., https://mycompany.looker.com or https://mycompany.cloud.looker.com). Do not include a trailing slash.

credentialFields.label: API Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: The client_id from your Looker API3 credentials. Create API keys in Admin > Users > Edit User > API Keys.

credentialFields.label: API Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: The client_secret from your Looker API3 credentials.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Looker users and their assigned roles to verify access controls and role-based permissions.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies the Looker instance is accessible and API credentials are valid by authenticating and retrieving the current user profile.
